title: When the Desert Wind Turns: The Stormtrooper's Tale

"'''When the Desert Wind Turns: The Stormtrooper's Tale'''" is a short story about [[Davin Felth/Legends|Davin Felth]] that takes place in [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]]. [[Doug Beason]] wrote the story for ''[[Tales from the Mos Eisley Cantina]]'', which [[Bantam Spectra]] published in [[August]] [[1995]].

==Plot summary==
As a new recruit, [[Davin Felth/Legends|Davin Felth]] travels to [[Carida/Legends|Carida]] with a large group of 18-[[Standard year/Legends|year]]-olds to begin his [[Carida Academy|military training]]. By working hard, he proves himself to be a superior recruit, and is taken to become an [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|AT-AT]] driver. After much time spent in the [[VR simulator|VR sims]], he is given an opportunity to operate an actual AT-AT, and is taken out to the training range by his [[Sergeant/Legends|sergeant]]. On the way there, the sergeant leaves the [[Cockpit/Legends|cockpit]] to check on [[Weapon/Legends|weapons]] and ammunition. While he is out, the AT-AT is attacked and Davin, unable to contact the sergeant, directs the AT-AT to kneel and then destroys his attackers. Afterwards, he is informed that this was a test and that he was the first [[Cadet/Legends|cadet]] to destroy all the attackers, but when he explains to [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Maximilian Veers/Legends|Veers]] that his unusual tactic was to protect the AT-AT from entanglement of the legs, he finds himself transferred to a [[Stormtrooper Corps/Legends|stormtrooper]] regiment on its way to [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]].

On Tatooine, his regiment, under orders from [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Mod Terrik|Terrik]], is assigned to find an [[Escape pod/Legends|escape pod]] that launched from a [[CR90 corvette/Legends|Blockade Runner]] that [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader's]] [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] had captured. After some time spent searching, and a couple of false alarms, Davin finds the escape pod and learns that it was occupied by [[Droid/Legends|droids]]. Following the trail of the droids, Davin's squad searches a [[Jawa/Legends|Jawa]] [[Sandcrawler/Legends|sandcrawler]], and upon learning that the droids they were looking for were sold to a [[Moisture farmer/Legends|moisture farmer]], Terrik orders the Jawas [[Death/Legends|killed]] and they continue their search. While searching [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]] for the missing droids, Davin and his backup enter a [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] to investigate a scream and find nothing but a surly [[Gender/Legends|man]] looking at his table. On leaving the cantina, a berserk Jawa attacks Davin's squad with a non-functioning [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]], and one of his squad-mates kills it. Shocked at the callous way the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]] regards [[Living Force/Legends|life]], Davin considers his future with the [[Imperial Military/Legends|military]] when he learns that the droids are escaping Tatooine. Running to [[Docking Bay 94/Legends|Docking Bay 94]] to stop it, Davin sees the man from the cantina holding off 20 or more [[Stormtrooper/Legends|troopers]] by himself, and when Terrik prepares to take a shot and kill the man, Davin shoots him in the back and the [[Starship/Legends|ship]] escapes. Contemplating his future, Davin decides to remain with the stormtroopers and do what he can to help the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|rebellion]] from the inside.
